summary: Playback reads treat Spotify's 204 No Content as data ({is_playing:false}) instead of an error; recommendations get-genres converted to a deprecated-endpoint stub (Spotify 404s it for new apps); replaced generator placeholder examples on check-library-contains and spotify-web-search with runnable values.
reason: Live dogfood happy-path probes run each command's Example verbatim and require exit 0. The 204-empty-body case is documented Spotify behavior for no-active-session; available-genre-seeds was removed in the 2024-11-27 Web API change; the two placeholder examples 400'd against the live API (the generator's own TODO comments flagged them).
validated_outcome: All five commands exit 0 against the live API (204 envelope, stub payload, and real reads respectively).
